title: No README.md deliverable
evidence: run_dir has no README.md (ls shows only app.py, models.py, test_app.py, requirements.txt, TASK.md); REQUIREMENTS.json R11 requires setup/run docs
suggestion: Add a README.md documenting install (pip install -r requirements.txt), how to run (python app.py), and how to run tests (pytest)

title: Dead/broken get_db_path() in app.py
evidence: app.py:15-17 get_db_path() evaluates a nonsensical '.__self__' expression and is never called; runtime uses models.get_db_path instead
suggestion: Delete app.py:15-35 dead helpers (get_db_path, _get_real_db_path, _real_db_path) and rely on models.py for DB path resolution

title: Very low token efficiency
evidence: scores.json token_efficiency=0.0108 — the local Hermes agent used a large token budget for a 545-LOC solution
suggestion: Informational; relevant for cross-agent cost comparison
